title: Neek's Gun Modpack
description: Using Mr Crayfish's Gunmod combined with a few other mods to enhance performance.
body:
DESCRIPTION
---
Using Mr. Crayfish's Gunmod [DISCONTINUED], combined with a few more mods to improve the performance of the Forge modloader and Minecraft overall. 

**Shaders are supported** with the built-in Oculus mod, which is an Iris port for Forge.

### NOTES
Newer versions (1.20 and up) will be released once all the mods are available for 1.20 or later. (2025 me here, no further updates have been made since 1.19.4)

### NEED HELP?
Need help, want to ask a question, or request a mod addition you believe would be nice to include in the modpack? **Create a new issue [here](https://github.com/neek8044/modpack-issues/issues)**
